description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a round, peach-colored face and simple black dot eyes, a small smiling mouth, and no visible nose. The doll has black, shoulder-length hair with two distinct upward curves or tufts on top, giving it a playful appearance. It is dressed in a plain, short-sleeved gray shirt and long black pants, with matching black shoes. The arms and legs are cylindrical and proportionally thin, with the arms extended straight out to the sides. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and no intricate details or textures. The doll's construction suggests it is made primarily of plastic, with a hollow or lightweight interior.
description: A minimalist humanoid doll with black hair, a gray shirt, black pants, and a smiling face. The design is smooth, simple, and stylized.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's smiling face, black hair with two tufts, gray shirt, and black pants with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the hair's volume, and the thinness of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with hair volume, the plain back of the shirt, and the straight alignment of the limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, hair, and the cylindrical limbs.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual modern style with a plain short-sleeved gray T-shirt and solid black pants, no visible patterns or logos.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso upright in a static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with simple black dot eyes and a curved mouth, no eyebrows or other emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, smooth black hair with two upward-curving tufts on top, covering the sides and back of the head.
